goal: 将 idea discovery 重设为 thesis-first 想象力优先流程

summary.title: 将 idea discovery 重设为 thesis-first product/OSS bet 流程
summary.what: 把每日 idea discovery 从 source-first 抱怨挖掘改成 thesis-first、imagination-led 流程：先生成高想象力 thesis 和 product/OSS bet sketches，再用证据做 support/challenge/kill/sharpen；同时更新 role contracts、workflow、source policy、report format、memory schema、automation prompt、README 和校验脚本。
summary.why: 用户希望 skill 更严格地筛掉不值得做的方向，同时保持保质保量；旧流程容易从单个吐槽派生 Action/CI/PR 小工具，缺少 AI 相关性、完整产品性和 high-star OSS 判断。
summary.user_goal: 将 idea discovery 重设为 thesis-first 想象力优先流程

decisions.chose: 先 thesis portfolio，再 product/OSS bet sketch，最后 evidence sweep
decisions.rationale: 避免证据优先把想象力压扁成 complaint-to-tool；证据只负责刹车、补强、挑战或否决。

decisions.chose: 默认 final 只收 AI-core 或 AI-native workflow；AI-leveraged 和 non-AI exceptional 需要更强 product/OSS 论证
decisions.rationale: 符合用户对 AI 相关、完整产品或高 star OSS 的目标，同时保留极强非 AI 机会的破例空间。

decisions.point: GitHub Action / CI / PR comment 等形态
decisions.chose: 只允许作为更大产品或 OSS 的 integration surface，不允许作为 final idea 本体
decisions.rationale: 解决最近输出过多 GitHub Action 和薄工具的问题。

decisions.chose: validator 强制检查 core thesis、AI relevance、Promotion Gate、30 秒 demo、repo/star asset、evidence_role，并拒绝 non-AI reject 或 rejected idea 进入 ideas/ dossier
decisions.rationale: 把口头规则落成可执行的报告和 artifact 合同。

rejected.alternative: 在旧 source-first 流程上继续小修 gate 文案
rejected.reason: 会保留从抱怨直接派生小工具的根因，难以改变输出分布。
证据仍然需要用于 kill/sharpen/competitor check，只是不再作为主要想象力来源。

review_notes: 已同步本机 heartbeat automation idea 的 prompt 和名称，让明日运行直接使用新 thesis-first 规则。
验证通过：git diff --check、node --check idea-scout-kit.mjs、node --check validate-run-artifacts.mjs、SKILL.md YAML frontmatter parse、idea-scout-kit smoke output。
旧 source-first/每日痛点等关键残留搜索无命中。

architectural_claims: idea-discovery-workflow now treats thesis generation as the first-class source of imagination and evidence as a later decision tool.
AI relevance and product/OSS Promotion Gate are mandatory before final selection.
Action/CI/PR/template/hook/checklist/thin-wrapper forms are integration surfaces unless backed by a larger product or high-star OSS project.
behavioral_changes: Daily prompt asks for up to 3 product/OSS bets instead of source-first pain-point ideas.
idea-scout-kit prints thesis seeds, product/OSS bet templates, AI relevance gates, promotion gates, and evidence sweep templates.
Report format now requires Discovery Thesis, Product / OSS Bet Sketches, Evidence Sweep, Promotion Gate, and final Product / OSS Bets sections.
Validator now requires core thesis, AI relevance, promotion gate details, 30-second demo, repo/star asset, and evidence_role metadata.

data_model_changes.name: source-notes.jsonl evidence_role
data_model_changes.migration_notes: New runs must write evidence_role as supports/challenges/kills/sharpens/competitor.

data_model_changes.name: idea core_thesis, ai_relevance, promotion_gate, product_card promotion fields
data_model_changes.migration_notes: New final/paused dossiers must include the new fields; older artifacts may fail the updated validator.

migration_notes: Existing historical artifacts are not rewritten; updated validator targets new runs and may fail old run directories until migrated.
The local heartbeat automation prompt was updated through the Codex automation API outside the git commit.
